description: Parses natural language or ambiguous date strings into a standardized ISO 8601 date

date_string_variable.description: Canvas variable name holding the raw date string to parse

reference_date_variable.description: Canvas variable name holding a reference date for resolving relative expressions (e.g. 'next Monday'). Defaults to today if not provided.

locale.description: BCP-47 locale tag for language-specific date parsing

parsed_date.description: The parsed date in the specified output_format

success.description: Whether the date string was successfully parsed
